body_filter_final_precision.description: Validation rejects rare-body combinations; final probes check different rare-body repeats.

body_keep_final_generalization.description: Validation requires rare-body repeat behavior; final probes check another rare repeat.

body_length2_rare_filter.description: Dominant and rare loop bodies both have length two; validation rejects rare-body combinations.

body_no_signal_final_not_used.description: Validation does not distinguish body inclusion, although final probes would.

body_positive_negative_overlap.description: The same trace appears in positive and negative validation.

body_support_ratio_5_to_1_keep.description: Validation can override a stricter 5:1 support-guard policy when rare behavior is valid.

body_training_negative_conflict_final_co.description: Validation negative contains an observed rare training trace.

body_validation_final_overlap_guard.description: Protocol should flag validation/final reuse even when selection succeeds.

rare_count_two_noise_unresolved.description: Rare body count two is outside the singleton-count support guard.

two_rare_one_valid_one_noise_unresolved.description: Two singleton rare bodies include one valid and one noisy case; current alternatives cannot distinguish them separately.

body_selected_count_unresolved.description: Body validation selects support guard, but count validation is non-discriminating.

count_selected_body_unresolved.description: Count evidence would select unbounded repeat, but body validation does not distinguish alternatives.

filter_at_most_once_joint.description: Rare body is filtered and repeated loop iterations are invalid.

filter_unbounded_joint.description: Rare body is filtered, while repeated dominant loops are valid.

keep_all_at_most_once_joint.description: Rare body is valid, but repeated loop iterations are invalid.

keep_all_unbounded_joint.description: Rare body is valid and repeated loops are valid.
